event_notes:
7:00 pm. Short intro to map-and-compass and orienteering. 7:30 pm. June COC business meeting and film (meeting room in the basement).

June meeting report (June/July 1979 newsletter): meetings now every other month (Jun/Aug/Oct/Dec), held at Greenlake Library, preceded by newcomer intro, followed by film when possible. Film shown: "Coping With Life on the Run" (Dr. George Sheehan), supplied by Karl Nolte. Meeting highlights: Troop 367 invited; meets scheduled through September; bylaws revisions presented.
